home.title: YuanGui Theater
home.description: We create Chinese-language stage productions in Silicon Valley, bringing together artists, audiences, and stories that deserve to be seen, heard, and remembered.
home.whoWeAreTitle: Theater rooted in language, performance, and human connection.
home.whoWeAreP1: YuanGui Theater is a non-profit Chinese theater organization based in Silicon Valley. We produce stage works that bring emotional depth, strong visual storytelling, and a meaningful audience experience to the Bay Area.
home.whoWeAreP2: Our work is driven by collaboration across acting, directing, writing, design, production, and community support. We believe a theater company should not only present performances, but also cultivate a lasting cultural space.
home.highlightsTitle: A stronger identity on stage and online.
home.card1Text: We develop and present productions that are actor-centered, visually compelling, and emotionally memorable.
home.card2Text: YuanGui brings together performers, directors, designers, volunteers, and supporters who care about thoughtful theater.
home.card3Text: From homepage messaging to ticket access, every touchpoint should make it easier for audiences to discover and attend the show.
home.ctaTitle: Follow the next production and stay close to the stage.
home.ctaText: Whether you are an audience member, collaborator, or supporter, we would love for you to be part of YuanGui Theater’s next performance.

eventAd.title: Rashomon
eventAd.description: Our upcoming production explores fractured truth, conflicting testimony, and the emotional weight of perspective.

showPage.title: Rashomon
showPage.description: A story of conflict, memory, truth, and contradiction. Our 2026 spring production invites the audience into a fractured world where every testimony changes what we think we know.
showPage.aboutTitle: One event. Multiple testimonies. No single truth.
showPage.aboutP1: Rashomon is a theatrical exploration of conflicting accounts and unreliable memory. Through layered perspectives and emotional confrontation, the production asks what remains when facts are filtered through fear, pride, shame, and survival.
showPage.aboutP2: This staging by YuanGui Theater blends dramatic tension, stylized imagery, and human vulnerability to create an evening that is both intimate and unsettling.
showPage.matineeText: Ideal for audience members who prefer an earlier performance.
showPage.eveningText: A later evening performance for audiences who prefer nighttime attendance.
showPage.faq1Text: Sunnyvale Community Center, 550 E Remington Dr, Sunnyvale, CA 94087.
showPage.faq2Text: This production is presented in Chinese.
showPage.faq3Text: Please select the correct showtime before purchase: 3:00 PM or 6:00 PM.
showPage.faq4Text: Reach out through the Contact page if you need help with attendance or ticketing.

ticketModal.title: Select your ticket time
ticketModal.description: Please choose which performance you would like to attend.

about.title: About YuanGui Theater
about.p1: YuanGui Theater is a Silicon Valley-based non-profit Chinese theater organization dedicated to creating meaningful and memorable stage productions.
about.p2: We bring together performers, directors, writers, designers, and supporters who believe theater can build connection, deepen empathy, and strengthen community.
about.p3: Our goal is to create a lasting cultural space where language, storytelling, and performance meet.

programs.title: Programs
programs.card1Text: We produce Chinese-language theater works for Bay Area audiences.
programs.card2Text: We welcome artists, volunteers, and production team members to contribute across every part of the process.
programs.card3Text: We build programming that strengthens audience engagement and community participation.

community.title: Community
community.p1: YuanGui Theater is more than a performance group. We are a creative community that values collaboration, artistic growth, and long-term connection.
community.p2: We hope every production becomes an invitation for new artists, new audiences, and new supporters to participate.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How can I join YuanGui Theater?
faq.a1: You can reach out through the Contact page if you are interested in acting, directing, production, design, or volunteering.
faq.q2: What language are the productions performed in?
faq.a2: Our productions are primarily presented in Chinese.
faq.a3: You can purchase tickets through the Current Show page by selecting your preferred showtime.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: We would love to hear from you. Reach out if you want to collaborate, join a production, or support YuanGui Theater.

brand.name: 元硅剧社
brand.tagline: 湾区非盈利中文话剧社

footer.copyright: 元硅剧社 版权所有。

home.eyebrow: 湾区非盈利中文话剧社
home.title: 元硅剧社
home.description: 我们在硅谷创作中文舞台作品，把演员、观众与值得被看见和记住的故事连接在一起。
home.whoWeAreTitle: 扎根于语言、表演与人与人之间连接的剧社。
home.whoWeAreP1: 元硅剧社是一家位于硅谷的非盈利中文话剧组织。我们为湾区观众带来具有情感深度、视觉表达和完整观演体验的舞台作品。
home.whoWeAreP2: 我们的创作由表演、导演、编剧、设计、制作与社区支持共同推动。我们相信，一个剧团不只是演出作品，也是在建设长期存在的文化空间。
home.highlightsTitle: 打造更完整的舞台与线上形象。
home.card1Text: 我们创作并呈现以演员为核心、视觉鲜明、情感有力的舞台作品。
home.card2Text: 元硅汇聚演员、导演、设计、志愿者和支持者，共同推动有思考的戏剧创作。
home.card3Text: 从首页信息到购票入口，我们希望每一个触点都能帮助观众更轻松地发现并走进剧场。
home.ctaTitle: 关注下一部作品，靠近舞台。
home.ctaText: 无论你是观众、合作者还是支持者，我们都希望你成为元硅剧社下一场演出的一部分。

eventAd.title: 罗生门
eventAd.description: 我们的下一部作品将围绕破碎的真相、相互矛盾的证词以及“视角”本身所承载的情感重量展开。

showPage.title: 罗生门
showPage.description: 这是一部关于冲突、记忆、真相与矛盾的作品。2026 年春季制作将把观众带入一个被不同证词不断改写的世界。
showPage.aboutTitle: 同一个事件。不同证词。没有唯一真相。
showPage.aboutP1: 《罗生门》是一部关于相互矛盾叙述和不可靠记忆的戏剧作品。通过层层展开的视角与情感冲突，它试图追问：当事实被恐惧、骄傲、羞耻与生存本能所过滤后，还剩下什么？
showPage.aboutP2: 元硅剧社的这次舞台呈现将戏剧张力、风格化视觉与人物脆弱性结合在一起，营造出既亲密又令人不安的观演体验。
showPage.matineeText: 适合希望较早观看演出的观众。
showPage.eveningText: 适合偏好晚间演出时间的观众。
showPage.visitTitle: 演出前你需要知道的内容
showPage.faq1Text: Sunnyvale Community Center，550 E Remington Dr, Sunnyvale, CA 94087。
showPage.faq3Text: 购票前请确认你选择的是正确场次：下午3点或下午6点。
showPage.faq4Text: 如果你需要帮助，请通过联系页面与我们取得联系。

ticketModal.title: 请选择购票时间
ticketModal.description: 请选择你想观看的演出场次。

about.title: 关于元硅剧社
about.p1: 元硅剧社是一家位于硅谷的非盈利中文话剧组织，致力于创作具有意义与记忆点的舞台作品。
about.p2: 我们聚集演员、导演、编剧、设计师和支持者，共同相信戏剧可以建立连接、深化共情并强化社区关系。
about.p3: 我们的目标是打造一个让语言、故事与表演相遇的长期文化空间。

programs.title: 项目
programs.card1Text: 我们为湾区观众创作和呈现中文戏剧作品。
programs.card2Text: 我们欢迎演员、志愿者和制作团队成员参与到创作流程的各个环节。
programs.card3Text: 我们希望通过更多活动增强观众互动和社区参与。

community.title: 社区
community.p1: 元硅剧社不仅是一个演出团体，更是一个重视协作、成长和长期连接的创意社区。
community.p2: 我们希望每一次演出都成为邀请更多新演员、新观众和新支持者加入的契机。

faq.title: 常见问题
faq.a1: 如果你对表演、导演、制作、设计或志愿工作感兴趣，可以通过联系页面与我们取得联系。
faq.q2: 演出主要使用什么语言？
faq.a2: 我们的作品主要以中文呈现。
faq.a3: 你可以在“当前演出”页面选择场次后直接购票。

contact.title: 联系我们
contact.description: 如果你想合作、加入制作或支持元硅剧社，欢迎联系我们。
